sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian’ khut in gelh, kawm tungah!
Pasian’ khut in gelh kawm
tungah!
“Tawi cing kei teh” hong ci kha diam?”
“Cing mah teh” hong
cizaw diam?
Hia khut in gelh lai hi, kawm tungah!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Daniel zong hangsan takin, mipi mai-ah hong ding hi,
Kiphasak kumpipa taai-in, a khialhnate
pulak hi;
“Na vekpi un thuak nuteh” ci-in kigelh hi, lai sungah,
“Na kumpi gam a
bei hita” ci-in kigelh hi, kawm tungah!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Daniel in upna tak tawh, thuman gen ngam, sem ngam hi,
Kha Siangtho piak hi, tua thusim, Amah
hatsak, theisak hi;
Judea gam a inn sung leh, a saltaanna inn sungah,
Amah in a khiatna thei khin,
Pasian’ laigelh kawm tungah!

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Eite gamtatnate zong, ciamtehin kigelhgelh hi,
Jesuh hong sawl bangbang mangin, Ama kiang va
zuan meng ni;
Thukhenni hong naizo hi, hong tung ding miteng tungah,
Mawh neite’ thuak ding
gimna lian, hong kigelh ding, kawm tungah!
